videos.title: How to Install & Remove Your iPad — Typecase Folio Duo Case
videos.description:
Quick guide on snapping your iPad in and getting it back out without the struggle.

PUTTING IT IN
1. Start with the two bottom corners — press them in and make sure they sit right.
2. Work your way up — press in the left side, then the right.
3. Snap the top two corners in one at a time.
4. Give it a once-over to make sure every edge is locked in before you go.

TAKING IT OUT
Start at the camera corner — that's your best entry point. Push the corner of the case in firmly to pop the iPad loose, t
